title: allium orosamium
intro: Allium orosamium, also known as the Himalayan leak or Himalayan onion, is a species of flowering plant in the onion genus Allium. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Allium orosamium include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Allium orosamium can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, as well as skin conditions like acne and wounds.
